hero_subtitle: SFTY provides executives with a structured view of audit evidence, decision logs, and compliance workflows to strengthen governance and reduce operational risk in digital asset businesses.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk

problem_title: Audit governance weakens without unified control
problem_description: Executives and risk leaders struggle to maintain clear oversight when compliance evidence, audit logs and decision history remain spread across multiple systems. This fragmentation slows audit readiness and makes operational risk harder to monitor and manage effectively.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes compliance evidence, decision logs and audit trails from multiple systems into one governance layer, giving executives clear visibility and streamlined oversight across digital asset compliance operations.
workflow_title: From case creation to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY organizes alerts, provider results and decisions into cases that record evidence logs and preserve audit trails for executive governance review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another workflow tool. Secure evidence control
why_sfty_description: SFTY gives executives a clear audit trail by connecting compliance decisions, evidence and logs in one scalable governance layer above existing tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP executives with a connected compliance control layer, connecting compliance workflows, audit evidence and decision logs for scalable operational risk management and governance oversight.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage audit evidence?
faq_2_answer: SFTY preserves audit-ready evidence by linking reviews, decisions and case files with provider outputs, supporting transparent and traceable compliance records for internal and external inspections.
faq_3_question: Can SFTY connect existing compliance providers?
faq_3_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates multiple existing providers’ outputs into one managed workflow without disrupting current systems, connecting data across KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening tools.
faq_4_question: How does SFTY support secure deployment?
faq_4_answer: SFTY supports controlled deployment with role-based access, audit logs, encryption, and governance settings tailored for regulated environments, enabling secure operation aligned to enterprise compliance policies.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, cases and reports, augmenting existing compliance stacks rather than competing with underlying service providers.
final_title: Govern audit evidence and decision history
final_description: Review how SFTY supports executive risk control with structured audit evidence, decision logs and operational compliance oversight for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
